_doc: Slot funnel for daily-use products (jar, daily decor). Emphasizes IN-USE early, BEFORE/AFTER, GIFT later.

slots.intent: LOCKED (RULE-016): Combined features + size infographic — header banner with category icon + product with dimension arrows (width, height, capacity/thickness callout bubble) + N numbered callout cards (rounded squares, macro + 2-line label) for material, capacity, durability, care
Empty vs full / messy vs organized

LOCKED (RULE-017): N-cell display-locations grid (default 2×2, adaptive 2-4 cells) — for jars/daily-use products the cells show kitchen counter / bathroom / bedside / office desk or similar niche-appropriate scenarios; safeguard: exactly N cells, no fifth floating product
